evals.prompt: I need to write an nf-test test file for a process called SAMTOOLS_INDEX. The process is defined in modules/samtools/index/main.nf, it takes a sorted BAM file as input (a tuple with meta map and bam file) and emits a tuple with meta and a .bai index file on a channel called 'bai', plus a versions.yml on a channel called 'versions'. Write a complete nf-test test file with at least two tests: one that verifies the process runs successfully and the output file has the right extension, and one that uses snapshot testing.
evals.expected_output: A complete .nf.test file with nextflow_process block, correct script path, at least 2 test cases using when/then blocks, process input tuple syntax, assertions on process.success and process.out.bai, and at least one snapshot assertion.

evals.prompt: I have a Nextflow workflow file at workflows/rnaseq.nf with a sub-workflow called RNASEQ_ALIGN that takes a channel of reads (tuples of meta + fastq files) and a genome index path, runs STAR_ALIGN and SAMTOOLS_SORT internally, and emits 'bam' and 'versions' channels. Write a complete nf-test workflow test for it. I want to test that it succeeds, that the bam channel has the right number of elements, and that the workflow runs the correct number of tasks.
evals.expected_output: A complete .nf.test file with nextflow_workflow block, correct script/workflow references, when block with workflow inputs, then block with assertions on workflow.success, workflow.out.bam.size(), workflow.trace.tasks().size(), and a snapshot assertion.

evals.prompt: I'm setting up nf-test for the first time in my Nextflow project. Walk me through: (1) initializing nf-test, (2) what goes in nf-test.config, (3) how to structure the tests/ directory, and (4) how to configure a tests/nextflow.config to limit CPU/memory during tests. Give me concrete examples of each.
evals.expected_output: Clear explanation covering: nf-test init command, nf-test.config with all key options (testsDir, workDir, configFile, profile, withTrace), tests/ directory structure example, and tests/nextflow.config with process resource overrides. Should include code blocks for all config examples.
